name: provana-superpowers
description: Provana AI-Native Delivery — system design, QA automation, Azure cloud architecture, voice/doc pipeline scaffolds, parallel orchestration, agentic SRE/LLMOps runbooks, and tool-forge. 26 skills covering full SDLC from discovery to production.
author: Provana Core AI team

provana-bootstrap.description: Every new session start — bootstraps AI-Native Delivery Model context

provana-tdd.description: Rigid TDD — RED → GREEN → REFACTOR → COMMIT for all code

conv-ai-scaffold.description: Pod 1: Conv.AI / LiveKit / voice pipeline scaffolding

azure-deployment.description: Deploy to Azure — containers, functions, storage, postgres, DNS

voice-pipeline-eval.description: Voice bot / STT / TTS / conversation flow QA

tool-forge.description: Domain gap — need a new tool

project-init.description: New project from zero — git, Azure RG, context wiring

azure-cicd.description: Azure DevOps pipeline YAML — build → test → deploy

parallel-build.description: Solo dev: parallel worktrees + subagent orchestration

team-collaboration.description: Multi-dev: FE + BE + AI engineer working without interference

skill-router.description: Classify session phase and domain, write context routing recommendation

secrets-scanner.description: Block bash commands that would expose secrets or credentials

injection-detector.description: Detect prompt injection patterns in file content being written

post-test.description: If the bash command was pytest, gate merge on test/QC verdict

doc-drift.description: Detect when code diverges from spec docs

mem-compile.description: Compile session memory to project knowledge base on session end

board-sync.description: Sync Azure Board task statuses on session end

sre-runbook-gen.description: Self-gated: auto-generate SRE runbook stub if notification text matches sre_alert/production_incident

llmops-alert.description: Self-gated: trigger LLMOps alert triage if notification matches llmops_alert/token_cost/model_drift/hallucination

arch-notify.description: Self-gated: notify when architectural decisions are detected in notification text
